title: First runnable personal homepage
goal: Move the repository from empty state to a runnable single-page personal homepage foundation.

title: Elevated visual identity refresh
goal: Transform the current homepage from competent but plain into a visually distinctive single-page experience with stronger luxury-editorial atmosphere, artistic composition, and premium polish.

title: Integrated composition and interest-driven interaction refresh
goal: Evolve the homepage beyond card-based presentation into a more integrated premium-artistic composition with a stronger palette and tasteful interactions inspired by computer science, AI agents, travel, and photography.

title: Continuous canvas and themed interaction refinement
goal: Unify the homepage into one continuous atmospheric canvas, repair the hero color seam, and evolve all five interests into cohesive high-end interaction languages while preserving the premium-artistic tone.

title: S005 same-sprint replan for unified interests and stricter dynamics
goal: Resolve the latest manual review findings inside S005 by removing hover gray boxes, consolidating interests into one independent section, allowlisting command navigation, and enforcing stricter dynamic_effects.md compliance.
